auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Rocketlane API key sent with the api-key header. Generate it in Rocketlane under Profile > Settings > API.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get one Rocketlane project by numeric project ID.

projectId.description: The Rocketlane project ID to fetch.

items.description: One Rocketlane project field to include in the response.

includeFields.description: The Rocketlane project fields to include in the response.

includeAllFields.description: Whether Rocketlane should return all available project fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting one Rocketlane project.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one Rocketlane project.

actions.name: get_task
actions.description: Get one Rocketlane task by numeric task ID.

taskId.description: The Rocketlane task ID to fetch.

items.description: One Rocketlane task field to include in the response.

includeFields.description: The Rocketlane task fields to include in the response.

includeAllFields.description: Whether Rocketlane should return all available task fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting one Rocketlane task.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one Rocketlane task.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get one Rocketlane user by numeric user ID.

userId.description: The Rocketlane user ID to fetch.

items.description: One Rocketlane user field to include in the response.

includeFields.description: The Rocketlane user fields to include in the response.

includeAllFields.description: Whether Rocketlane should return all available user fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting one Rocketlane user.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one Rocketlane user.

actions.name: list_projects
actions.description: List Rocketlane projects with pagination, sorting, and first-pass project filters.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

pageToken.description: The pagination token returned by the previous Rocketlane list response.

includeAllFields.description: Whether Rocketlane should return all available fields.

sortOrder.description: The sort order for the Rocketlane list response.

match.description: Whether Rocketlane should match all filters or any filter.

items.description: One Rocketlane project field to include in the response.

includeFields.description: The Rocketlane project fields to include in the response.

sortBy.description: The Rocketlane project field used for sorting.

projectNameEq.description: Return only Rocketlane projects with this exact project name.

projectNameContains.description: Return only Rocketlane projects whose project name contains this value.

statusEq.description: The Rocketlane status or external identifier.

items.description: The Rocketlane status or external identifier.

statusOneOf.description: Return Rocketlane projects whose status matches one of these identifiers.

startDateGt.description: A Rocketlane date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startDateGe.description: A Rocketlane date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

dueDateLt.description: A Rocketlane date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

customerIdEq.description: Return only Rocketlane projects for this customer company ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Rocketlane projects.

projects.description: The Rocketlane projects returned for the current page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Rocketlane list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Rocketlane projects.

actions.name: list_tasks
actions.description: List Rocketlane tasks with pagination, sorting, and first-pass task filters.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

pageToken.description: The pagination token returned by the previous Rocketlane list response.

includeAllFields.description: Whether Rocketlane should return all available fields.

sortOrder.description: The sort order for the Rocketlane list response.

match.description: Whether Rocketlane should match all filters or any filter.

items.description: One Rocketlane task field to include in the response.

includeFields.description: The Rocketlane task fields to include in the response.

sortBy.description: The Rocketlane task field used for sorting.

taskNameEq.description: Return only Rocketlane tasks with this exact task name.

taskNameContains.description: Return only Rocketlane tasks whose task name contains this value.

taskStatusEq.description: The Rocketlane status or external identifier.

items.description: The Rocketlane status or external identifier.

taskStatusOneOf.description: Return Rocketlane tasks whose status matches one of these identifiers.

projectIdEq.description: Return only Rocketlane tasks for this project ID.

startDateGt.description: A Rocketlane date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

dueDateLt.description: A Rocketlane date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

atRiskEq.description: Return only Rocketlane tasks that match this at-risk flag.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Rocketlane tasks.

tasks.description: The Rocketlane tasks returned for the current page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Rocketlane list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Rocketlane tasks.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Rocketlane users with pagination, sorting, and first-pass user filters.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

pageToken.description: The pagination token returned by the previous Rocketlane list response.

includeAllFields.description: Whether Rocketlane should return all available fields.

sortOrder.description: The sort order for the Rocketlane list response.

match.description: Whether Rocketlane should match all filters or any filter.

items.description: One Rocketlane user field to include in the response.

includeFields.description: The Rocketlane user fields to include in the response.

sortBy.description: The Rocketlane user field used for sorting.

firstNameEq.description: Return only Rocketlane users with this exact first name.

firstNameContains.description: Return only Rocketlane users whose first name contains this value.

emailEq.description: Return only Rocketlane users with this exact email address.

emailContains.description: Return only Rocketlane users whose email address contains this value.

statusEq.description: Return only Rocketlane users with this exact status.

statusOneOf.description: Return Rocketlane users whose status matches any of these values.

permissionIdEq.description: Return only Rocketlane users with this permission ID.
